word: G1669 - ἑλκόω - helkóō - hel-ko'-o - Full of sores

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἑλκόω

- Transliteration: helkoo

- Phonetic: hel-ko'-o

- Definition:

1. to make sore, cause to ulcerate

2. to be ulcerated

3. full of sores

- Origin: from G1668

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1668; to cause to ulcerate that is (passively) be ulcerous: - full of sores.
